reviews.title: Like King & Queen
reviews.text: Wah, hmpr lupa, ktk post review Bridal, kami menulis menang 2 undian. pdhal 3 un Irene Wibowo 5 Review 4.5/5.0 | 27/12/2010 | Service: Wedding Venue & FnB

real_weddings.venue: home  wedding vendors  hotel wedding venue  conrad bali

about: The Conrad Bali resort offers a selection of intimate indoor and outdoor locations to exchange your wedding vows, whether you prefer a private garden gazebo surrounded by tropical palms and foliage or an oceanfront bale, a traditional Balinese pavilion. Pointing gracefully into the heavens, Infinity floats two metres above the sea level among an ensemble of overflowing reflecting pools and marble walkways. Elegant marble floors, floor-to-ceiling glass frontage, and a transposable seating plan to create a wedding exceeding your wildest dreams. Indoor reception venue options include three award-winning restaurants and our Grand Ballroom.
